commands: git push -u origin chore/guvfx-governance-convergence (SSH transport; see limitations)
expected_results: C1 commit present on remote branch
GitHub Actions CI push run for head_sha == C1 completes
Every non-skipped CI job concludes success
actual_results: CI run 27956004590 status completed, conclusion success
limitations: Application integration (backend Django tests with PostgreSQL, frontend lint/build) ran in GitHub Actions, not on the local Mac. The local environment lacks Django/venv/PostgreSQL, so 'make check' was not runnable locally; GitHub Actions is the approved full integration gate. The GFX-PKT-003I-A local evidence manifest remains truthfully PARTIAL.

The branch push used SSH transport (git@github.com) because the local HTTPS OAuth credential lacked the 'workflow' scope required to push the changed .github/workflows/ci.yml. The persisted origin URL was not modified.
